title: cyamus luteus
intro: Cyamus luteus, also known as yellow bugloss, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and relieve rheumatic pain. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are used to prepare herbal remedies, which are said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of Cyamus luteus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
